abilities.name: From Two Worlds
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may remove a Rift marker within 6". If it does so, draw a card.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

triggers.name: Hole in the World
triggers.text: Place the target within 6" of its current location.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Coil Around Prey
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Place the target into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Chilopodophobia
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of this model gain a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Consume
triggers.text: Friendly only. Kill the target. This model heals an amount equal to the target's health.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.
